message: 🌱 Add envoy: Prometheus: add native histogram support mission (#501)

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,72 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "envoy-32686-prometheus-add-native-histogram-support",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "envoy: Prometheus: add native histogram support",
+    "description": "Prometheus: add native histogram support. Requested by 27+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current envoy deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your envoy version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n envoy -l app.kubernetes.io/name=envoy\nhelm list -n envoy 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working envoy installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review envoy configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant envoy configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n envoy -l app.kubernetes.io/name=envoy\nkubectl get configmap -n envoy -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=envoy\n```\n*Title*: Prometheus: add native histogram support\n\n*Description*:\nhttps://prometheus.io/docs/concepts/metric_types/#histogram\n\nPrometheus has a new native histogram mode which (claims to) make a much better tradeoff between metrics cost and"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Prometheus: add native histogram support",
+        "description": "There are a few steps that would be needed to implement this:\n\n1) Add support in Envoy for the protobuf format for prometheus stats. It would probably need either a different path on the admin endpoint, or a query parameter/header to indicate this is what we want, or possibly infer it via content-type headers.\n\n2) Possibly create a different histogram backend than the current `libcircllhist` one. I'm not sure if the output formats for native histograms and the storage in `libcircllhist` work\n\nSee the fix PR for details: linked PR"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n envoy -l app.kubernetes.io/name=envoy\nkubectl get events -n envoy --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Prometheus: add native histogram support\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "There are a few steps that would be needed to implement this:\n\n1) Add support in Envoy for the protobuf format for prometheus stats. It would probably need either a different path on the admin endpoint, or a query parameter/header to indicate this is what we want, or possibly infer it via content-type headers.\n\n2) Possibly create a different histogram backend than the current `libcircllhist` one.",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
